name: check_gate
description: Look up the metadata for a specific Bubbles gate (e.g. G024, G028, G035) — returns the full JSON record (gate id, name, description, etc.) from bubbles/registry/gates.yaml via gate-meta.sh. Use when an agent or operator needs to know what a gate enforces. Set action='list' to enumerate every gate id, or action='exists' for a presence check.

gate_id.description: Three-digit gate identifier, e.g. 'G024'. Omit when action='list' or action='count'.

action.description: Lookup mode. 'json' (default) returns the full record. 'name'/'description'/'exists' return single fields. 'list'/'count' ignore gate_id.
